sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20710" key="bouturofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-τῡροφάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n20710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">butter-eater</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:41:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.8</biblScope> </bibl> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
